ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment ended */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used in the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reinforcement learning algorithm used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode within the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this episode belongs to */,
  "timesteps" INTEGER /* Number of timesteps taken in the episode */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicator of success in the episode */,
  "feedback" INTEGER /* Number of feedback instances received */,
  "percentage_feedback" REAL /* Percentage of feedback that contributes to learning */,
  "e" REAL /* Exploration rate */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the experience replay buffer */,
  "human_model" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a human model is involved */,
  "tau" REAL /* Temperature parameter for softmax action selection */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the episode started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the episode ended */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward accumulated during the episode */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward per timestep */,
  "max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward obtained in a single timestep */,
  "min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward obtained in a single timestep */,
  "episode_length" INTEGER /* Length of the episode in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this feedback belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback received */,
  "feedback_value" REAL /* Value of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment these hyperparameters belong to */,
  "e" REAL /* Exploration rate */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the experience replay buffer */,
  "tau" REAL /* Temperature parameter for softmax action selection */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Discount factor for future rewards */,
  "epsilon_decay" REAL /* Rate at which the exploration rate decays */,
  "epsilon_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the exploration rate */,
  "tau_update_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the target network is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_models" (
  "human_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this human model is involved in */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the human model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the human model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the human model */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the human model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("human_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this timestep belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward received */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state reached */,
  "done_id" INTEGER /* ID of the done flag */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken at this timestep */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received at this timestep */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state reached after taking the action */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the episode ended at this timestep */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when this timestep occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this reward belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the reward was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this action belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this state belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state reached */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the state was reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "done_flags" (
  "done_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each done flag */,
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timestep this done flag belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the episode */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the done flag indicating the end of an episode */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the done flag was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("done_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_done_flags_timestep_id FOREIGN KEY ("timestep_id") REFERENCES timesteps ("timestep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
